## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run build` so all generated files are current (CI runs `--check`)
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run contrast` passes
- [ ] I did **not** hand-edit any generated file (only `palette/src/colors.ts` holds raw hex)
